title: Smoky Keto Gratin
description: A low-carb, keto-friendly twist on the classic French dish. Smoky flavors from the bacon complement the creamy cheese.
instructions: 2. In a skillet, cook the chopped bacon over medium heat until crispy. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the crushed casabe, shredded Smoky Gouda, softened cream cheese, and cooked bacon.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 9x9-inch baking dish.
5. Sprinkle the grated Gratin on top of the mixture.
6. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is set.
8. Remove from oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
